meaning: n.[解]血浆,乳浆,[物]等离子体,等离子区
examples: After a pint of blood is collected, it is processed into its transfusible components: plasma, platelets and red blood cells.
Plasma amylase was studied by an enzymatic method using Bernfeld technique.
Establish a method for the determination of quinapril and its active metabolite quinaprilat in human plasma.
The device has a built-in sleep timer and is compatible with monitor, LCD, plasma and projection displays.
After cocktails, over 650 guests were seated for dinner at tables whose centerpieces were plasma balls.
